question: Based on the percentages shown next to each category in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Jewelry has the highest value among the categories.
options.B: Clothing has the highest value among the categories.
options.C: Cards have a higher value than Flowers.
options.D: Dining Out has a higher value than Candy.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
